correctness_fixes: train-only Age median fill: medians now computed on training data and applied consistently to both train and test (was computed independently per split)
notes: All 7 proposed group-dynamics features were implemented and tested. With all 7, CV dropped to 0.8079 (vs 0.8086 baseline) — not an improvement. Features were reverted per policy (only keep if CV improves). Only the correctness fix (train-only median for Age NaN fill) was kept, yielding a marginal improvement to CV=0.8088.
hypothesis_outcome: failed — group-dynamics features did not improve CV
